original_text:
Iranians celebrating peace and supporters of Field Marshal Asim Munir

Once reports emerged that an Iran-U.S. peace deal was becoming a reality, some hardline religious groups and Pahlavi supporters in Iran took to the streets to protest the agreement. The protests received little attention globally.

Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced news of peace, which was  endorsed by both the U.S. and Iran. It claims that a formal signing ceremony is expected this Friday in Geneva, hosted by Pakistan.

After the announcement, most Iranians expressed gratitude and celebrated. In Iran right now, when people see Pakistanis, they greet them enthusiastically with вЂњThank you, PakistanвЂќ and вЂњThank you, Syed Asim MunirвЂќ instead of the usual greeting.

**CATEGORY: 2**  
*Aoa, sir*  

рџ”¶Subject : *OSINT Update вЂ“ Chakwal CCD Operation Mishap (15 Jun 2026)*  

рџ”№**Punjab CCD** under **Addl IG Sohail Zafar Chattha (SZChatthaPSP)** faced a tragic unintended civilian casualty during anti-robbery operation in **Chakwal**. A 9-year-old girl, **Hania Ahmed** (Australian-Pakistani dual national), was killed when officers fired on a civilian vehicle mistakenly identified amid chaos; father and brother injured.
